assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls builder.Services.AddIdentityServer() to register IdentityServer services in DI
assertions.rationale: Line 10 calls builder.Services.AddIdentityServer() to register IdentityServer services.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddInMemoryApiScopes with a scope named 'api1'
assertions.rationale: Lines 11-14 call AddInMemoryApiScopes with a new ApiScope("api1", "My API").

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddInMemoryClients with a client having ClientId 'm2m.client' and AllowedGrantTypes set to ClientCredentials
assertions.rationale: Lines 15-24 call AddInMemoryClients with ClientId = "m2m.client" and AllowedGrantTypes = GrantTypes.ClientCredentials.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls app.UseIdentityServer() in the middleware pipeline before app.UseAuthorization()
assertions.rationale: Line 30 calls UseIdentityServer() before line 31 UseAuthorization().
Line 29 calls UseRouting() before line 30 UseIdentityServer().
